Subject: Re: US/tariffs

Many thanks Mungo.

Your continued engagement with the USTR team would be particularly helpful as we seek
specific feedback on what’ s on the table as soon as possible.

As per our exchange on text, we're just working out travel, as key counterparts appear to
be heading to Florida earlier than usual this week.

Best,
Varun

Varun Chandra | Prime Minister’s Special Adviser on Business and Investment

10 Downing Street, London SW1A 2AA | Personal
